name: Le Filet De Lapin a La Moutarde
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the rabbit filets in 1/2 cup of white wine and the thyme and bay leaves for 24 hours.
2. Sauté the rabbit lightly in oil until browned, then remove it from the pan.
3. Add the remaining white wine and Creole mustard to the pan. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in the heavy cream, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Slice the rabbit filets lengthwise into strips. Place the sauce over the rabbit and serve.
